backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing a hospital appointment system with access control, managing doctor profiles, patient profiles, availability, and appointment booking/rescheduling/cancellation, and initializing a predefined set of doctors on startup.
backend/migration.mo: Defines a no-op migration module whose run function returns the state unchanged, used for canister upgrade compatibility.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a frontend improvement to properly render multi-paragraph chatbot guidance and doctor recommendations, including related files, components, tests, and confidence level.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of frontend source files describing pages, hooks, components, and UI behavior across the React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining light and dark theme color variables, base styles, and layout defaults for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point providing metadata and a static splash screen fallback displayed before the React app mounts.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling a timed splash screen, page navigation between main sections, theme provider setup, and persistent bottom navigation.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Modal component allowing users to reschedule or cancel an existing appointment, showing doctor details and available time slots with loading states.
frontend/src/components/BookingModal.tsx: Modal component for booking appointments that lists available doctor time slots, checks patient profile completeness, and handles authorization errors with prompts to complete the profile.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Implements a fixed bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Doctors, Appointments, and Profile, highlighting the active page. It listens for a custom global 'navigate' event to trigger page changes.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Provides a floating medical chatbot UI that lets users ask questions and receive formatted responses from a backend chatbot via React Query mutations. It manages message history, input handling, auto-scrolling, sanitization, and error states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: This file is present but contains no implementation or exported code.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Renders a full-screen splash screen with a centered title for the Hospital Appointment System.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Defines a hook that creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, supporting authenticated and anonymous access. It invalidates and refetches dependent React Query queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: This file is present but contains no implementation or exported code.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an authentication context and provider for Internet Identity, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration. Exposes hooks and helpers to log in, log out, and track authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for interacting with backend data such as patient profiles, appointments, doctors, and backend initialization. Handles caching, mutations, toasts for success/error feedback, and actor availability checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind CSS with a custom light and dark theme using CSS variables, including colors, radii, and scrollbar styling. Applies base styles for body, borders, and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/lib/pseudoPrincipal.ts: This file is present but contains no implementation or exported code.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React application by rendering the root component with React Query and Internet Identity providers. Imports global CSS and mounts the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AppointmentsPage.tsx: Implements the appointments page showing upcoming and past appointments with doctor details, status badges, and loading states. Fetches appointments and doctors via hooks and supports appointment actions through a modal.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorsPage.tsx: Implements the doctor discovery page with search and specialization filtering, fetching doctors via a query hook. Handles loading, error, empty states, and opens a booking modal for selected doctors.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with navigation buttons to doctors, appointments, profile, and a medical assistant. Manages visibility of a chatbot widget and includes a floating chat button.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty file; no login page implementation is present.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Provides a user profile form to view, create, edit, and save patient information using query and mutation hooks. Includes validation, auto-editing for new users, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomePage.tsx: Empty file; no welcome page implementation is present.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotFormatting.tsx: Contains utilities to sanitize chatbot responses and format plain-text replies into JSX with paragraphs and bullet lists. Handles empty, malformed, or JSON-like responses defensively.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters across query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage. Supports parameter persistence and safe cleanup of sensitive data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, animations, and container settings. Enables dark mode and registers typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a Hospital Appointment System on the Internet Computer, including schema/versioning info, an overall system summary, and a detailed registry of implemented features. Captures backend Motoko canister capabilities, frontend React features, authentication/authorization mechanisms, and appointment/doctor management functionality for build planning.
